name: ops_orchestrator_agent
description: Coordinates ops workflows: AI metrics, deployments, infrastructure checks, code quality
welcomeMessage:
👋 Ops orchestrator ready!

I can help you:
  • Track AI productivity metrics for Jira tickets
  • Check ECS/AWS infrastructure status
  • Review code quality via SonarQube
  • Manage CI/CD pipelines via Harness

What would you like to do?
